Another one in the books! Today was my 51st earnings call as a CEO - always a busy day! #VTeam #ForwardTogether https://t.co/mBEMFBe9BH

Overall, we made progress this quarter in a tough environment. 

Our core business and our strategy showed strength and we have solid momentum going into the second quarter.

For our full earnings release, go to: https://t.co/AJjYF5gDlt $VZ
Our priority for 2022 is to continue to execute on our Network as a Service Strategy and to drive growth across all of our five vectors. $VZ

Today, we also released our Environmental, Social & Governance Report for 2021 and we are proud of our progress. The report covers our ESG strategy in detail and reflects how responsible business practices drive our business. Read the report here: https://t.co/wxiwClT1UR $VZ

In addition to the results in #5G mobility, nationwide broadband, MEC & B2B and the value segment, we also see ongoing momentum in the fifth vector, network monetization, with growth in volumes driving incremental revenues. $VZ
On the consumer side, Verizon Consumer Group delivered top-line growth that was driven by the first full quarter of ownership of TracFone Wireless, Inc. @brouilletm. $VZ

Our Business Group continues to have very strong momentum in Wireless. I am proud to report that @TamiErwinVZ and her team delivered the best quarterly phone net adds since we formed Verizon Business Group, and they are just getting started. $VZ

We believe in giving our customers maximum optionality.

We are empowering our customers to choose the services they need. And we are delivering. $VZ

At the Superbowl, we demonstrated the power of #5G to deliver new in-stadium and home experiences. Fans streaming the halftime show had access to multiple camera angles streaming over our network, fully immersing them in the entertainment experience. $VZ

A strategic pillar in our network expansion is our C-Band buildout, which combined with our continued mmWave rollout, further establishes and strengthens our network leadership, with RootMetrics ranking us again as the most reliable #5G network in the US. $VZ

We are already taking advantage of this infrastructure, and capitalizing on an addressable market that is growing as consumers and businesses adopt #5G.

We saw this growth in our wireless sales, our customer loyalty, and the rapid expansion of our fixed wireless business. $VZ

The strategy starts with our network expansion and execution.

As I’ve said many times, mobility, broadband and cloud are the essential pieces of 21st century infrastructure. $VZ
We are uniquely positioned, with a focused strategy and strong execution capabilities to meet the needs of our 4 stakeholders in the growing #5G Economy. $VZ

I am pleased with the progress across our 5 vectors during the quarter, as we continued to make progress towards our long term targets and delivered a solid start to the year, even in the face of competitive and
macro-economic pressures. $VZ

During the first quarter, the team continued to execute on our Network as a Service strategy. This strategy underpins our 5 vectors of growth, and the diverse paths to revenue growth that set us apart. $VZ
